mapper.sql: b.id, b.category_id, c.name AS category_name, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.total_stock, b.available_stock, b.status, b.created_time, b.updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.status = 'ON_SHELF' ORDER BY b.id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book b
AND b.status = 'ON_SHELF'
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{author}, '%')
AND b.category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.isbn = #{isbn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (category_id, title, author, publisher, isbn, total_stock, available_stock, status) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{isbn}, #{totalStock}, #{availableStock}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, author = #{author}, publisher = #{publisher}, isbn = #{isbn}, total_stock = #{totalStock}, available_stock = #{availableStock} WHERE id = #{id}
